name: Avatar
description: Display user profile image, initials or fallback icon
searchText: avatar display user profile image, initials or fallback icon @mantine/core /core/avatar allowedinitialscolors alt autocontrast children color gradient imageprops name radius size src

props.name: allowedInitialsColors
props.description: A list of colors that is used for autogenerated initials. By default, all default Mantine colors can be used except gray and dark.

props.name: alt
props.description: Image alt attribute, also used as title attribute for placeholder

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: children
props.description: Avatar placeholder, displayed when src={null} or when the image cannot be loaded

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the user. When src is not set, used to display initials and to generate color when color="initials" is set.

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: size
props.description: Width and height of the avatar, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: src
props.description: Image url, if the image cannot be loaded or src={null}, then placeholder is displayed instead
